---
title: "In-class: XGBoost Regression with Tidymodels (Kaggle-style train/test)"
output:githuub_document
---

```{r setup, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
library(tidymodels)
library(vip)        
```

## Read in Data
```{r}
pf<-read_csv("student_performance.csv")%>%
  select(-id)%>%
  rename("ps"="productivity_score")

```


```{r}
pf_split <- initial_split(pf)
pf_train  <- training(pf_split)
pf_test   <- testing(pf_split)
```


## Recipe
```{r}
pf_formula <- as.formula("ps ~ .")

pf_rec <- recipe(pf_formula, pf_train) %>%
  update_role(student_id, new_role = "id") %>%
  update_role(ps, new_role = "outcome") %>%
  step_other(all_nominal_predictors(), threshold = 0.05) %>%
  step_unknown(all_nominal_predictors()) %>%
  step_dummy(all_nominal_predictors()) %>%
  step_zv(all_predictors())%>%
  step_normalize(all_predictors())

```


```{r}

```
